message:
feat(rgc-063): add required_readme_fragments to cross-platform matrix contract

Bump cross-platform matrix contract version 1.1.1 → 1.1.2 and add
required_readme_fragments array with five required README fragment
strings.

Update CrossPlatformMatrixContract struct with new field. Extend
rgc_063_contract_declares_required_logs_artifacts_and_drift_classes
test to assert all five fragments. Add new test
rgc_063_readme_documents_gate_commands_and_artifacts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "schema_version": "franken-engine.rgc-cross-platform-matrix.v1",
-  "contract_version": "1.1.1",
+  "contract_version": "1.1.2",
   "bead_id": "bd-1lsy.11.13",
   "policy_id": "policy-rgc-cross-platform-matrix-v1",
   "required_log_keys": [
@@ -20,6 +20,13 @@
     "matrix_target_deltas.jsonl",
     "matrix_summary.json"
   ],
+  "required_readme_fragments": [
+    "## RGC Cross-Platform Matrix Gate",
+    "./scripts/run_rgc_cross_platform_matrix_gate.sh ci",
+    "./scripts/e2e/rgc_cross_platform_matrix_replay.sh matrix",
+    "docs/rgc_cross_platform_matrix_v1.json",
+    "artifacts/rgc_cross_platform_matrix/<timestamp>/matrix_summary.json"
+  ],
   "targets": [
     {
       "target_id": "linux-x64",
